title: zerna syriaca
intro: Zerna syriaca, also known as Syrian rue, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to induce emesis and treat various health issues such as intestinal worms, fever, and rheumatism. The plant's seeds and leaves are rich in alkaloids, which provide its medicinal benefits, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. Zerna syriaca can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its health benefits include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating rheumatic pain.
